repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

antenna_pattern CIWS_RADAR_ANT
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 30 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 5 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 10 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

platform_type SHIP_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 30 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor ciws_sensor WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 1 sec
      minimum_range 0 nm
      maximum_range 20 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern CIWS_RADAR_ANT
         power 100 kw
         pulse_width 1.0e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 1000 hz
         frequency 10 ghz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern CIWS_RADAR_ANT
         bandwidth 5 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
   processor ciws_manager WSF_WEAPONS_MANAGER_AI
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform_type MISSILE_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 400 m/sec
      minimum_speed 50 m/sec
   end_mover
end_platform_type

weapon ciws_gun WSF_IMPLICIT_WEAPON
   weapon_quantity 1500
   rate_of_fire 3000 /min
   maximum_range 3 nm
   minimum_range 0 nm
end_weapon

platform blue_ship SHIP_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.50n 122.00e speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor ciws_sensor on
end_sensor

platform red_missile_1 MISSILE_TYPE
   side red
   heading 270 deg
   route
      position 30.70n 122.10e altitude 3000 m msl speed 300 m/sec
      position 30.55n 122.02e altitude 10 m msl speed 300 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform red_missile_2 MISSILE_TYPE
   side red
   heading 270 deg
   route
      position 30.70n 122.10e altitude 3000 m msl speed 300 m/sec
      position 30.55n 122.02e altitude 10 m msl speed 300 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/ciws_interception.aer
end_event_pipe

end_platform
end_time 180 sec
